name: io.github.zNetinho/runrunit-n1
title: Runrun.it MCP Server
description: MCP server for Runrun.it: Tasks, Comments, Projects

environmentVariables.name: CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME
environmentVariables.description: Cloudinary cloud name (for skills: upload-image-cloudinary, evidências em PRs/comentários)

environmentVariables.name: CLOUDINARY_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Cloudinary API key (for image upload in skills)

environmentVariables.name: CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Cloudinary API secret (for image upload in skills; never expose client-side)
